title: Boho Fiesta Rectangular Plastic Table Cover (137cm x 213cm) - Vibrant & Colorful Design Party Essential - Perfect for Outdoor, Indoor, Birthday, Wedding - 1 Pc, Nylon/a
features: VIBRANT & COLORFUL DESIGN: Transform your party space with the boho fiesta rectangular plastic table cover, featuring a bright and cheerful print that is sure to impress your guests and elevate the atmosphere of any celebration.

HIGH-QUALITY PLASTIC MATERIAL:Made from premium-grade plastic, our table cover ensures durability and resilience, providing excellent protection against spills, stains, and scratches, while keeping your tables looking clean and pristine.

PERFECT FOR ALL OCCASIONS: Whether hosting an outdoor garden party, an indoor birthday bash, or a stunning wedding reception, the versatile boho fiesta table cover effortlessly complements any event, adding a unique and stylish touch to your festivities.

REUSABLE & ECO-FRIENDLY: The boho fiesta table cover is easily wiped clean and reusable, making it a cost-effective and environmentally friendly alternative to disposable tablecloths, saving you both time and money in the long run.

CONVENIENT SIZE & EASY SETUP: Measuring 137cm x 213cm, our table cover is designed to fit most standard rectangular tables and is incredibly simple to set up, allowing you to effortlessly create a beautiful tablescape in no time.
description: From the manufacturer Coordinating Solid Colours Hot Pink Sunflower Yellow Pumpkin Orange Lime Green Caribbean Teal True Navy Blue Boho Fiesta Add-On Items Celebrate fiesta style with these Boho inspired designs!
